ftueChain.why: wood is the start of everything
it unlocks the full crafting grid
set it down to craft bigger things
mines faster AND cracks open ore
light keeps monsters away at night
raw iron smelts into strong metal
iron gear is tough — it unlocks armor

ftueChain.text: Eat some food (hold it + E / USE)
ftueChain.why: food refills your hunger to keep exploring
clear the night so you can explore safely
your own world that saves forever

weeklyPool.text: Place 25 blocks in a friend's world
Have friends place 10 blocks in YOUR world
